tasks.label: Start MinIO Container
tasks.command: docker rm -f soba-minio || true && docker run -d --name soba-minio -p 9000:9000 -p 9001:9001 -e MINIO_ROOT_USER=minioadmin -e MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD=minioadminpassword minio/minio server /data --console-address ':9001' && echo 'Waiting for MinIO to initialize...' && sleep 3 && docker exec soba-minio mc alias set myminio http://127.0.0.1:9000 minioadmin minioadminpassword && docker exec soba-minio mc mb --ignore-existing myminio/soba-bucket
